-  "notes": "AI triage (claude): Data loss bug: when MySQL database fails to load, the existing connection configuration is erased instead of preserved, causing users to lose their connections.\nApproach: Wrap the database load in a try/catch that aborts the merge/overwrite step on failure, preserving the existing in-memory configuration rather than clearing it before the error is surfaced.",

+  "last_synced": "2026-02-24T22:01:02Z",
+  "notes": "AI triage (claude): Data loss bug: when MySQL database fails to load, the existing connection configuration is erased instead of preserved, causing users to lose their connections.\nApproach: Wrap the database load in a try/catch that aborts the merge/overwrite step on failure, preserving the existing in-memory configuration rather than clearing it before the error is surfaced."
 }

-  "notes": "AI triage (claude): Crash when closing a panel with active connection tabs — likely a guard condition gap in ConnectionWindow.Connection_FormClosing() or ClosePanelIfEmptyOnUiTick() causing ObjectDisposedException or NullReferenceException during panel/tab disposal race.\nApproach: Add null/disposed guards around connDock.Documents iteration in Connection_FormClosing(), ensure silentClose flag is set before iterating tabs, and protect ClosePanelIfEmptyOnUiTick() against disposed connDock state when panel close is user-initiated rather than tab-removal-triggered.",

+  "last_synced": "2026-02-24T22:48:31Z",
+  "notes": "AI triage (claude): Crash when closing a panel with active connection tabs — likely a guard condition gap in ConnectionWindow.Connection_FormClosing() or ClosePanelIfEmptyOnUiTick() causing ObjectDisposedException or NullReferenceException during panel/tab disposal race.\nApproach: Add null/disposed guards around connDock.Documents iteration in Connection_FormClosing(), ensure silentClose flag is set before iterating tabs, and protect ClosePanelIfEmptyOnUiTick() against disposed connDock state when panel close is user-initiated rather than tab-removal-triggered."
 }

+      "snippet": "**Fix available for testing**\n\n**Commit:** **[CENSORED!] Links to external GitHub repositories are not allowed**\n**Branch:** `main`\n**What changed:** An unhandled exception has occurred\n\n**Download latest beta:** **[CENSORED!] Links to external GitHub repositories are not allowed**\n\nPlease test and report if this resolves your issue.\n\n---\n_Automated by mRemoteNG Issue Intelligence System_",

+  "comments_cursor": "2026-02-24T22:31:22Z",
   "unread_comments": 1,
   "needs_action": true,
   "waiting_for_us": false,
-  "last_synced": "2026-02-21T12:06:48Z",
-  "notes": "AI triage (claude): Verified ObjectDisposedException crash when closing SSH connection window — protocol fires Prot_Event_Closed after ConnectionWindow is already disposed, causing unhandled exception that terminates the app.\nApproach: In Prot_Event_Closed, add IsDisposed/Disposing guard before Control.Invoke so the callback is silently ignored if the window was already disposed during closure.",
-  "impl_failed": true
+  "last_synced": "2026-02-24T22:48:31Z",
+  "notes": "AI triage (claude): Verified ObjectDisposedException crash when closing SSH connection window — protocol fires Prot_Event_Closed after ConnectionWindow is already disposed, causing unhandled exception that terminates the app.\nApproach: In Prot_Event_Closed, add IsDisposed/Disposing guard before Control.Invoke so the callback is silently ignored if the window was already disposed during closure."
 }

Ensure the full prefixed username is preserved and correctly utilized during connection establishment."
 }

   "body_snippet": "## Case\n- RDP (via mstsc) connection to mRemoteNG active workstation (jump-host) breaks RDP tab resolution\n\n## To reproduce\n- Connect to jump-host machine via RDP via mstsc (where mRemoteNG should be launched)\n- Open mRemoteNG on jump-host\n- Connect to any RDP from your profile via mRemoteNG\n- Disconnect from jump-host\n- Connect to jump-host again via RDP\n- Got wrong resolution inside RDP tab\n\n## Mitigation fix\n- RDP tab > Reconnect\n- Or try to drag whole mRemoteNG window and maxize again\n\n## Ve...",

Is it possible to wait until credentials are satisfied for a user's interactive login before sending the Opening Command text?  If both a username and passwor...",
